source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/01_DHF/01_HAD1717MC, MG/DHF/14. 디텍터 구동 Software/히스토리/SW_SDK_ HAD1717MC_개발_히스토리.xlsx

sourceSummary.oneLine: Software SDK/DLib/XAS development history for HAD1717MC-related detector software, listing version changes and release notes from dated and undated entries.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports DHF traceability for detector-driving software changes, release distribution notes, and field/test version history.
keyPoints: The history defines version management formats for distribution, debug, and release versions.
DLib changes include FPGA parameter updates, Auto Trigger changes, saturation logic, socket handling, grid filter behavior, and detector temperature API support.
Several entries are explicitly marked as test versions or not officially distributed.
The 2022.01.11 Dlib Version 1.0.0.3 entry is marked as the last officially distributed version in the source text.
Later 2022 entries document ongoing field issue improvements and limited CS delivery.

concepts.evidence: Dlib 이미지 Saturation 현상 개선관련 Gain Correction 처리 구조 변경.

concepts.evidence: 디텍터 내부 온도값 읽어 올 수 있도록 Api 추가 및 기능 구현.

concepts.name: Grid filter
concepts.evidence: Grid filter 기능 추가에 따른 SDK 알고리즘 개선. Grid, AED On/Off 옵션 기능 추가.

evidence.claim: The source is a software development and release history for HAD1717MC-related SDK/DLib software.
evidence.evidenceText: sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/01_DHF/01_HAD1717MC, MG/DHF/14. 디텍터 구동 Software/히스토리/SW_SDK_ HAD1717MC_개발_히스토리.xlsx

evidence.claim: The document defines version numbering formats for distribution, debug, and release versions.
evidence.evidenceText: 배포 버전 관리 : 1.0.x.x / Debug ver : 1.x.x.x.x / Release ver : 1.x.x.x

evidence.claim: DLib version changes include FPGA parameter setting UI and parameter updates.
evidence.evidenceText: DLib Version : 1.1.0 -> 1.3.1,1.FPGA Parameter Setting 창 기존 3개에서 4개로 분리

evidence.claim: The software history includes Auto Trigger logic changes.
The 2019.12.20 entry states DLib Version 1.0.0 was distributed as a production release version.
evidence.evidenceText: 2019.12.20,DLib Version : 2.22.6->1.0.0,"XAS 1. Ver 1.0.0 배포 시 Dlib_0.ini 파일 구버전 적용으로 Latest 버전으로 갱신함. 양산 릴리스 배포 버전."

evidence.claim: The 2021.06.08 DLib Version 1.0.0.1 entry was distributed through quality after change reporting.
evidence.evidenceText: 2021.06.08,DLib Version : 1.0.0.1 ... 변경점 신고 후 품질 배포함.

evidence.claim: The 2021.06.17 DLib Version 1.0.0.2 entry says the improved AED Line and Grid line version was a test version, not officially distributed at first, then officially distributed for mass production on 2021.06.21.
evidence.evidenceText: 2021.06.17,DLib Version : 1.0.0.2 ... 테스트 버전으로 사용됨.(정식 배포 안함. 버전 정보 변경 후 추후에 적용 예정. ) ... 2021.06.21 양산 배포 버전으로 정식 배포함.

evidence.claim: The 2021.08.30 DLib Version 1.0.0.3_test entry was a test version and not distributed for mass production.
The 2021.12.21 Dlib Version 1.0.0.3 entry added grid filter echo messaging and SDK algorithm improvements including Grid and AED On/Off options.
evidence.evidenceText: 2021.12.21,Dlib Version : 1.0.0.3,"XAS 1. grid filter 적용 기능 동작 시 echo 메시지 주고 받도록 송/수신 기능 추가. 2. Grid filter 기능 추가에 따른 SDK 알고리즘 개선. Grid, AED On/Off 옵션 기능 추가."

evidence.claim: The 2022.01.11 Dlib Version 1.0.0.3 entry is marked as the last officially distributed version.
The 2022.09.01 Dlib Version 1.0.0.3 entry says SDK pre-processing algorithm improvement was ongoing for field image line issues.
evidence.evidenceText: 2022.09.01,Dlib Version : 1.0.0.3 ... field 영상 촬영 시 256, 2816 line 표시되는 이슈로 인해 SDK pre-processing 처리 알고리즘 외주개발 개선 진행함. ... 현재 개선 진행 중.

evidence.claim: The 2022.11.22 Dlib Version 1.0.0.4 entry addresses socket error when using Dual Detector after PC reboot with detectors powered on.
evidence.evidenceText: 2022.11.22,Dlib Version : 1.0.0.4,"XAS + SDK 1. Dual Detector 사용 시 디텍터는 전원 On상태이고, PC만 재부팅 후 feel-DRCS 콘솔 촬영 진입 시 socket error 현상 개선."

reviewFlags.reason: No formal document date is stated; dated rows are change-history entries rather than a document issue date.
No document revision number is stated separately from software/DLib version entries.
No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified; authoritySignal is general.
No standards are cited in the source text.
Release status is mixed: some versions are marked test or not officially distributed, while later notes mention field or limited CS delivery.
